hard_gates: no independent technical verification is explicitly stated
primary or external source queried during current work
access path and access time recorded
profiles.strong_coverage_gate: Use at least two independent sources and report discrepancies before claiming strong reference coverage.

hard_gates: exact bytes or proof material obtained
tool or command and output recorded
official_script_gate: script path and commit or blob identity recorded
environment, command, exit code, output, and errors recorded
forbidden_claims: independent reproduction from official tools only
full public coverage without target inventory

hard_gates: independently written code, independent parser, or separately selected toolchain used
independent inputs, method, tools, and outputs recorded
complete public digital target inventory declared
every relevant target family checked or listed unavailable
limitations and claims not made recorded
no physical or institutional conclusion inferred

none: state no physical material was reviewed
public_media_review: do not claim live, custody, onsite, or forensic status

none: state no separate external witness record was used
notarial_scope: record office, certificate number, date, parties, objects, and process
independent_report: review method, inputs, outputs, and limitations
institutional_attestation: confirm accountable institution formally adopted exact report
record scope, signatory or office, date, archive, and limitations
regulatory_or_court_record: record jurisdiction, docket or record number, issuing body, date, and operative scope

universal_downgrade_rules: No primary or external query: context_only maximum.
No local integrity operation: reference_checked maximum.
Official script run without source review: no audited-script claim.
Missing expected-value source: no successful integrity-match claim.
Only official tools used: not independent_reproduction.
Photos or recorded video only: physical_observation=public_media_review.
